subcodes.title: Words spoken to Bishop Burg at Hotel Ansonia in New York, 1912-04-15
subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God that material progress hath been achieved in these lands; yet material civilization alone sufficeth not [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله ترقیات مادیه در این بلاد حاصل است ولکن مدنیت مادیه تنها کفایت نکند
subcodes.subjects: @critique of Western values; culture, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction, @East and West; communication between East and West, @unity; oneness of humanity
